summary: The video begins with a clear view of a highway, showing a truck traveling in the opposite direction. Suddenly, the truck crashes violently into the road divider, causing it to overturn completely.

events_timeline.event: A truck travels along the highway in the opposite direction.
The truck crashes violently into the road divider, overturning completely.

uncertainties: Exact nature of the crash impact is unclear due to limited frames.

risk_assessment.why: The truck crashes violently into the road divider, overturning completely, indicating a severe accident.
